berserker.name: Berserker
berserker.description: An incautious front-line fighter wielding a falchion who grows more dangerous as it takes hits.
berserker.notes: Trained in martial weapons, Athletics, Intimidation, and Warfare Lore. Wields a falchion (1d10 slashing). When a berserker takes damage, it gains a +1 status bonus to its next damage roll before the end of your next turn (increasing as it advances).

medic.name: Medic
medic.description: A skirmish medic that patches up the party in combat.
medic.notes: Trained in Medicine, Nature, and Herbalism Lore. Has the Battle Medicine feat and a healer's toolkit, and carries a scalpel (1d4 piercing).

scout.name: Scout
scout.description: A stealthy melee scout that exploits openings for extra damage.
scout.notes: Trained in Acrobatics, Stealth, and Survival. Wields a shortsword and deals 1d4 extra precision damage to off-guard targets.

sharpshooter.name: Sharpshooter
sharpshooter.description: An archer that takes careful aim and hampers enemies it hits.
sharpshooter.notes: Trained in Acrobatics, Stealth, and Hunting Lore. Wields a shortbow. Take Aim (two actions): a ranged Strike with a +2 circumstance bonus to hit. A creature it damages takes a -5-foot circumstance penalty to its Speeds for 1 round (-10 on a crit).

shieldbearer.name: Shieldbearer
shieldbearer.description: A shield-wielding protector that can block hits and react on command.
shieldbearer.notes: Trained in Athletics, Survival, and Warfare Lore. Carries a shield (Hardness 5, HP 20, BT 10), can Raise a Shield (+2 AC), has the Shield Block feat, and gains a reaction when Directed.
